mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, ua.account, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.campus_id, c.name as campus_name, u.is_real_name, u.created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_auths ua ON u.id = ua.user_id AND ua.identity_type = 'PASSWORD' LEFT JOIN campuses c ON u.campus_id = c.id WHERE u.status = 0
AND ua.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.campus_id = #{campusId}
AND u.is_real_name = 1
ORDER BY CASE WHEN ua.account = #{keyword} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, u.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, ua.account, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.campus_id, c.name as campus_name, u.is_real_name, u.created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_auths ua ON u.id = ua.user_id AND ua.identity_type = 'PASSWORD' LEFT JOIN campuses c ON u.campus_id = c.id WHERE u.status = 0
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.campus_id = #{campusId}
AND u.is_real_name = 1
ORDER BY CASE WHEN u.nickname = #{keyword} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, LENGTH(u.nickname), u.created_at DESC
SELECT u.*, c.name as campus_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN campuses c ON u.campus_id = c.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.status = 0
